title: Install wiring: extend skills-and-hooks.ts with installFabricImportSkill + addImportSkillPointer
description: Extend the existing install pipeline (rc.2 fabric-archive + rc.3 fabric-review installer pattern) with `installFabricImportSkill` and `addImportSkillPointer` functions. The skill template authored in TASK-004 must be copied to `<repo>/.claude/skills/fabric-import/` AND `<repo>/.codex/skills/fabric-import/` (Cursor reads either path). The pointer adds a one-line reference to fabric-import skill in CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules. init.ts and hooks.ts call sites updated. Integration tests extended to cover the third skill install.

files.target: Add 2 new exports: installFabricImportSkill + addImportSkillPointer; mirror installFabricReviewSkill (rc.3 8ad3ac3) shape exactly
files.change: Add `export async function installFabricImportSkill(repoRoot: string): Promise<void>` mirroring installFabricReviewSkill: read packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md template body, write to <repoRoot>/.claude/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md AND <repoRoot>/.codex/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md (mkdir -p both); idempotent (no-op if file content identical). Add `export function addImportSkillPointer(content: string): string` that inserts a one-line reference to fabric-import skill in target file content (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules); idempotent — checks if pointer line already present and returns content unchanged if so. Pointer text: `- Import knowledge from git history + docs: invoke `fabric-import` skill (when starting on a project with existing artifacts)`.

files.target: init bootstrap stage that calls installFabricArchiveSkill + installFabricReviewSkill
files.change: Add `await installFabricImportSkill(repoRoot)` call alongside existing installFabricArchiveSkill and installFabricReviewSkill (sequential ok; idempotent). Update pointer-merge step to call addImportSkillPointer alongside addArchiveSkillPointer + addReviewSkillPointer for CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules content.

files.target: hooks reinstall path that calls installFabricArchiveSkill + installFabricReviewSkill
files.change: Add `await installFabricImportSkill(repoRoot)` call alongside existing skill installers in the reinstall flow.

files.target: extend test cases that cover archive + review skill install with import skill assertions
files.change: Extend existing test cases (e.g., `installs_skills_and_hooks_idempotently`) with assertions for fabric-import: file exists at <repoRoot>/.claude/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md AND <repoRoot>/.codex/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md; content matches template body; idempotent (2nd call no-op); pointer added to CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules. Add 3 new test cases: install_fabric_import_skill_writes_to_both_paths, install_fabric_import_skill_idempotent, add_import_skill_pointer_does_not_duplicate.

implementation: Read packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts to locate installFabricArchiveSkill + installFabricReviewSkill (rc.3 commit 8ad3ac3) and addArchiveSkillPointer + addReviewSkillPointer; mirror their exact shape for the import variants
Read packages/cli/__tests__/integration/install-skills-and-hooks.test.ts to lock existing test seed pattern (tmpdir, fixture, expectations)

Implement installFabricImportSkill: cwd-relative resolve template path (`new URL('../../templates/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md', import.meta.url)` or equivalent module-path pattern matching review variant); read template; ensure dest dirs exist (mkdir -p <repoRoot>/.claude/skills/fabric-import/ + <repoRoot>/.codex/skills/fabric-import/); compare existing file content (if exists) to template; if identical, no-op; else atomicWriteText
Implement addImportSkillPointer: pure string transform on file content; check for existing pointer marker (constant line); if absent, append + return; if present, return unchanged; idempotent

Wire init.ts: locate existing rc.3 installFabricReviewSkill call; add installFabricImportSkill call immediately after; locate addReviewSkillPointer call; add addImportSkillPointer call immediately after for each pointer-target file
Wire hooks.ts: same pattern as init.ts
Extend integration test: add 3 new test cases in install-skills-and-hooks.test.ts covering the new install + pointer; run all integration tests, verify green
Run typecheck on cli package: `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli typecheck`; run full test: `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test`

Verify on Fabric self-repo: `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js init --reinstall-skills` in a tmpdir copy → confirm fabric-import/SKILL.md appears in both .claude/skills/ and .codex/skills/
Commit as 'feat(cli): install fabric-import Skill alongside archive+review (rc.4 TASK-005)'

reference.pattern: rc.3 8ad3ac3 installFabricReviewSkill + addReviewSkillPointer pattern; rc.2 8dfa018 installFabricArchiveSkill + addArchiveSkillPointer (originating pattern)
reference.examples: rc.3 commit 8ad3ac3 entire diff; rc.2 commit 8dfa018 originating installer pattern

criteria: init.ts calls installFabricImportSkill alongside archive + review
init.ts calls addImportSkillPointer for CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules
After init on tmpdir fixture, file <repoRoot>/.claude/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md exists with template body content
After init on tmpdir fixture, file <repoRoot>/.codex/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md exists with template body content
After init on tmpdir fixture, CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules each contain the import-skill pointer line
2nd init invocation is idempotent: no file mutations (verified by mtime snapshot)
addImportSkillPointer applied to a file already containing the pointer is a no-op (verified by string equality)
Integration test passes 3+ new test cases
0 type errors; 0 regression in existing install tests

rationale.chosen_approach: Mirror rc.3 installFabricReviewSkill exactly; minimal divergence; same dest paths (.claude/skills + .codex/skills); same idempotency semantics
alternatives_considered: Single installAllSkills function that loops over [archive, review, import] — rejected: rc.3 already established per-skill installer; symmetric-with-existing is lower-risk than refactor
Skill-as-package (npm install fabric-import) — rejected: skills are local to user repo; npm package is overkill for prose template
Different dest paths for import (e.g., .fabric/skills/) — rejected: convention is .claude+.codex per rc.2/rc.3
decision_factors: Minimal divergence from rc.3 reduces review burden
Symmetric design = symmetric tests = symmetric maintenance
Dest paths must match Cursor's read paths (.claude or .codex; not .fabric)
rationale.tradeoffs: Three near-identical installer functions invite future refactor (DRY); accepted for v2.0 since each may diverge in v2.1 (e.g., import-specific config); refactor when pattern crystalizes

manual_checks: After TASK-005, run `node packages/cli/dist/index.js init` in a fresh tmpdir; verify .claude/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md + .codex/skills/fabric-import/SKILL.md exist
Run init twice; verify mtime unchanged on 2nd run (idempotent)
Cat .cursor/rules; verify pointer line present once

risks.description: Template path resolution differs between dev (source) and prod (npm-installed dist) — installFabricImportSkill might look in wrong dir
risks.mitigation: Mirror rc.3 installFabricReviewSkill template-path resolution exactly (likely uses `new URL('../templates/skills/fabric-review/SKILL.md', import.meta.url)` or fileURLToPath pattern); test from compiled dist (not just source); verify in dogfood (TASK-009)
risks.fallback: If path resolution fails in prod, embed template content as string export from a generated TS file (build-time inlined)

risks.description: Pointer-line uniqueness check could match too loosely (e.g., similar substring in unrelated content) and skip valid append
risks.mitigation: Use exact-line match (split content by '\n', check Array.includes on full pointer line); document the exact pointer text as a constant
risks.fallback: If false-positive idempotency reported, tighten match logic in patch release

key_functions.signature: export async function installFabricImportSkill(repoRoot: string): Promise<void>
key_functions.purpose: Copy SKILL.md template to .claude/skills + .codex/skills paths; idempotent
Pure string transform; insert pointer line if absent; idempotent
